package.title: Choose a Package for Your Store
package.content:
Pay now to unlock more features, enjoy better service and support. The following payment methods are supported:
√ UnionPay (debit and credit cards, with auto billing)
√ Credit Card (Visa, JCB, MasterCard, American Express, with auto billing)
√ WeChat Pay

domain.title: Choose a Domain for Your Store
domain.content: A good domain name helps embed your brand in people's minds. After purchasing a domain from domain service providers such as GoDaddy or Alibaba Cloud, you can resolve the domain and bind it to the MATACART backend.

productTab.name: Add Products
productTab.title: Add Products
productTab.desc: You can continue to add more new products
productTab.doneDesc: You can continue to add more new products

logisticsTab.name: Configure Logistics
logisticsTab.title: Configure Logistics
logisticsTab.desc: You can continue to add more logistics methods
logisticsTab.doneDesc: MataCart supports setting up logistics templates for different countries/regions based on multiple dimensions such as weight, and can also support multiple schemes simultaneously. Logistics providers can also be added in the backend.

paymentMethodTab.name: Configure Payment
paymentMethodTab.title: Configure Payment
paymentMethodTab.desc: You can continue to add more payment methods
paymentMethodTab.doneDesc: You can set appropriate payment methods according to the regions where you sell

customPageTab.title: Create Custom Pages
customPageTab.name: Create Custom Pages
customPageTab.desc: You can continue to add more custom pages
customPageTab.doneDesc: You've successfully added pages, you can continue to add more pages or improve existing page information.

navigationTab.title: Organize Navigation
navigationTab.name: Organize Navigation
navigationTab.desc: You can continue to add more navigation items
navigationTab.doneDesc: You can continue to add more navigation items
